items.title: How Investors May Respond To Caterpillar (CAT) Lifting 2025 Outlook On Data Center and Energy Demand
items.description: Caterpillar Inc. recently reported record third-quarter revenues of US$17.6 billion, lifted its full-year 2025 sales guidance, and posted a backlog of US$39.8 billion, with robust demand in the Energy & Transportation segment fueled by data center and government projects. An interesting insight is that Caterpillar also outlined capacity expansion plans targeting 5-7% annual revenue growth through 2026, counterbalancing ongoing tariff pressures that are expected to impact profits. We will...

items.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Jumps On Shutdown Hopes; This Stock Gets Support (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow Jones index was up on the stock market today as government shutdown hopes rose. Bitcoin rallied while Nvidia and Palantir stock jumped.
